ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., East, West) */,
  "conference_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conference */,
  "conference_location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Villanova) */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the team (e.g., @novambb) */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "twitter_handle_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the Twitter handle is verified or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seed_conferences" (
  "seed_conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference seeding */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed value for the team in the conference (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "seed_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the seeding applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed_conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seed_conferences_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitter_accounts" (
  "twitter_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Twitter account */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the team (e.g., @novambb) */,
  "account_created_at" TEXT /* Date when the Twitter account was created */,
  "account_language" TEXT /* Language of the Twitter account */,
  "account_private" INTEGER /* Whether the Twitter account is private or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("twitter_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twitter_accounts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitter_metrics" (
  "twitter_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Twitter metric */,
  "twitter_account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Twitter account */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date for which the Twitter metrics apply */,
  "num_favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites for the team */,
  "num_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the team */,
  "num_friends" INTEGER /* Number of friends for the team */,
  "num_statuses" INTEGER /* Number of statuses for the team */,
  "num_lists" INTEGER /* Number of lists the team is a member of */,
  "num_media" INTEGER /* Number of media files (e.g., images, videos) posted by the team */,
  "retweet_avg" REAL /* Average retweets for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("twitter_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twitter_metrics_twitter_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("twitter_account_id") REFERENCES twitter_accounts ("twitter_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_tv_broadcast" TEXT /* TV broadcast information for the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "game_stat_type" TEXT /* Type of game statistic (e.g., home, away, total) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the team */,
  "game_stat_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "standing_date" TEXT /* Date for which the standings apply */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "conference_seed" INTEGER /* Conference seed for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team, conference, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., team performance report, conference standings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., team performance, conference standings) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "report_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report content */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content in the report (e.g., text, image, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "user_role_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's role assignment */,
  "user_role_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
